user.title: Choose a location
user.description: Place the pin where you want to monitor collection times. The integration will list the 20 nearest collection points.

results.title: Choose a collection point
results.description: The 20 nearest collection points are listed below. Format: distance｜point (district village)｜scheduled times

data_description.enabled_route_keys: Choose which routes at this collection point should remain active.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the New Taipei City Open Data Platform. Please check your network connection.
error.no_results: No collection points found. Please try a different location.

abort.already_configured: This collection point is already configured.

data_description.enabled_route_keys: Choose which routes at this collection point should remain active.

update.name: Refresh truck data
update.description: Manually refresh garbage truck location data.

entry_ids.name: Entry IDs
entry_ids.description: Config entry IDs to refresh. Leave empty to refresh all entries.
